content.text:
Implement a typed event emitter in TypeScript that:
- Supports typed events via generics: EventEmitter<Events>
- Events map: on, off, emit, once
- Wildcard listener '*' catches all events
- Listener count tracking per event
- Error handling: one listener failing doesn't stop others
- RemoveAll method to clear all listeners for an event or all events

Write to event-emitter.ts

Your entire response below this line will be saved as the source file. Start with the first line of code. No markdown formatting, no backticks, no explanation. Just raw source code.
